acholi.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: aye kabedo ma jo mapol gicako iye — cingi kene i kom a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
acholi.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: butoon. Dyslexia font, audio cues, high-contrast, large-key keyboard, ki mukene — gin aye gin ma iloko, pe yoo mukene keken.
acholi.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Pe timer, pe race, pe kum pi streak. Wot kun i pace ni. Yweyo i kare mo keken.
acholi.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: drill — AI coyo practice text i grade level ni i kom gin mo keken ma imito. Cak
acholi.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: twero loke — raa me marac ma i wiye loko kin visual theme 5. Onyo dii
acholi.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Clinician onyo lapwony twero keto IEP goal ki export progress ki i
acholi.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Nino calendar ma pat ki session acel onyo mapol i nino 30 mukato. Pe bal pi nino me yweyo.
acholi.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Ket onyo mwony coc. Nyig coc ma leng, namba, ki cim me coc ma nywako gitiyo maber.
acholi.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — session man pe kigwoko. Pe tek, pe record.
acholi.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Onyo dii Space onyo Enter me cako. Dii Esc i kare mo keken i kare me drill me kato woko.
acholi.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Passage ma pe leb Munu tiyo ki ASCII keken (pe accents / tildes) wek standard keyboard keys omede me bedo practice target.
acholi.shorter_simpler_words: nyig coc ma cek dok yot
acholi.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: labol, polo, guk, Minecraft, nam, cwir me Maine
acholi.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Passage sets ma kicoyo ki cing ma tiyo ma pe AI. Passage ma kikelo donyo i library ma kigwoko; passage acel-lu cabit ki cabit obedo baseline ma tir loyo pi IEP trend kato text ma kiloyo odoco.
acholi.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Passages ma kiloyo cutcut. Drill mo keken me tic kwede odoco. Macon loyo poto woko ka iloyo me 9.
acholi.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Pe text ma kiketo pi drill man.
acholi.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Bar acel-acel = characters ma kiketo i window me 10-second. Hover me neno WPM ma cok.
acholi.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Lagam ni konyo lupwonye me neno kare ma namba pe tito lok ducu.
acholi.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Session man ocito nining? "Acako mot, amede, atiyo ki slow-motion mode..."
acholi.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Note kigwoko ki session man. Bibino i IEP report ki CSV export.
acholi.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Yub cal me agiki ki image-to-image kun pe cako odoco ki i acakki
acholi.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Download cal man macalo PNG file
acholi.top_miss_this_session: Bal ma dwoŋ i session man:
acholi.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Tem text acel odoco me loyo score ni
acholi.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Nyuto passage ducu pi second magi ma peya typing ocako. Konyo lukwan ma gikonye ki kwan mukwongo, ci giloyo. Lakwan twero kalo count-in i kare mo keken.
acholi.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: I nge dakika magi me typing (kare me yweyo pe kikwano), nyut nudge mamwol me kwanyo yweyo. Timme kicel pi drill. Loko woko ki i default.
acholi.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Loko nen ducu pa tool. High-contrast mode loyo themes. Kawaii obedo theme ma leng; mukene gubedo macol.
acholi.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Loko highlight color ma kitiyo kwede pi character ma kombeddi, butooni, ki milestones. Pi lukwan ma neno bulu ngic tutwal onyo mito rangi ma lyet me focus. High-contrast mode loyo man.
acholi.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Yer drill texts ma cek onyo bor loyo. "Cek" konyo lukwan ma tye ki peko me attention onyo ol; "Bor" pi lukwan ma gedo endurance. Ka drill pe tye ki samples ma rwatte ki preference, gitiyo ki mo keken.
acholi.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Dot mamwol ma tye ka gwek i drill screen nyuto rhythm ma cung matek. PE kum pi wot mot loyo — obedo reference, pe deadline. Konyo pi motor-planning. Loko woko ki i default.
acholi.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Man aye kabedo ni. Pingo itye ka practice? Target ni pi tin en aŋo? Opat ki clinician IEP goal.
acholi.why_i_m_practicing_shown_on_menu: Pingo atye ka practice (nyutu i menu)
acholi.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: labol, "Typing tek kombeddi, ento abitwero coyo ododo na kena." · "Amito coyo email bot dana ma mama pe konya." · "Typing oyot loyo = kare me homework nok loyo."
acholi.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Goal me tin obedo meni — pe kikwano i kom ni ka pe ino. Dwogo cen kene diki.
acholi.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Ket IEP-style goal kany. Nyutu i drill screen ci pongo progress report con. Mite keken ka itye ka loyo progress notes ma atir.
acholi.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Tii ki initials onyo nying me alii — AlloFlow kigero me bedo FERPA-safe.
acholi.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: labol, Maro home-row ki large-key keyboard; dwoko bal piny peya imedo speed.
acholi.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Gwok accommodations + IEP goal + audio theme i JSON, onyo load profile ki i gin mukene. Pe copy session history — man dong bedo pi lakwan acel-acel.
acholi.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Full backup tye ki sessions, personal best, mastery, error heatmap, ki libraries aryo — record pa lakwan ducu. Tii kwede peya ijwaa browser data onyo iloko gin.
acholi.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Yoo me dongo ni kikom. Pe apoka ki lawoti — obedo in keken, i kare.
acholi.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Mako trend, report, CSV. Skill tree dong bedo all-time.
acholi.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Med onyo yub note. Gwoko ka ikato woko onyo Ctrl+Enter.
acholi.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Nyaŋ Δ = dongo · kwar = dwogo cen · grey = pe ŋolo (duration, accommodations count).
acholi.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Keys ma bal dwoŋ i drill · all-time
acholi.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drills mapatpat nyuto goro mapatpat. Tii kwede me yero drills ma mako keys ma tye ki peko.
acholi.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Magi miyo deyo pi temo accommodations — pe kanogi. Tic ki gin ma konyo obedo teko, pe goro.
acholi.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Average WPM ki accommodation acel-acel ma cak vs ma loko woko. Kicoko kwede i kin drill types — riwo drill twero balo, mumiyo tii ki per-drill breakdown i report ma piny pi decisions madoŋo.
acholi.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Dii report me yero ducu, onyo tii ki butoon ma piny.
acholi.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Copy cok me sentence 2-4 i leb ma yot pi email bot lunyodo
acholi.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Tyek drill ni mukwongo me neno baseline, trend, ki IEP report ni kany.
acholi.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Pe session ma rwatte ki filter ma kombeddi.
acholi.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: Wot kin drill cards ki nav buttons
acholi.activate_the_focused_drill_card: Cak drill card ma focus tye iye
acholi.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Tem drill me agiki odoco (fast jump)
acholi.start_today_s_drill_of_the_day: Cak drill me nino pa tin
acholi.on_any_screen_with_a_form: I screen mo keken ma tye ki form
acholi.move_to_next_field_button: Cit i field / butoon ma lubo
acholi.activate_focused_button_context_depend: Cak butoon ma focus tye iye (lubo context)
acholi.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Gin ducu i Typing Practice ki twero o iye ki keyboard — man aye design pi lutic me screen-reader ki motor-planning accommodations.
acholi.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Accommodation toggles i drill-intro screen ki twero o iye ducu ki keyboard pi Tab — pe mite mouse pi tur mo keken pa tool man.
acholi.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Game mode ka imito. Nyig coc gia malo ki i piny; ket nyig coc ma malo me jwaa. Ka pino o i wiye, match tum. Pe leaderboard, pe streak guilt — personal best keken.
acholi.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Theme acel-acel tye ki mascot ma bino i playfield, i menu, ki i summary screen. Gigamo i kom gin ma itye ka timo — combo, can, lweny, nino, loyo, poto.
acholi.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Yer attack word me cwalo bot
acholi.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ ATTACK READY — yer nyig coc me cwalo
acholi.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Dii card ONYO dii 1 / 2 / 3 me cwalo. Dii Esc me kalo ma pe cwalo. Pino ni cung matek i kare ma iyero.
acholi.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Ocuŋ — pino aryo cung matek. Dii Resume onyo Esc me mede.
acholi.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Ged foundation. Mot + atir loyo oyot + pe atir.
acholi.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Dongo ma cung matek. Gwok accuracy floor.
acholi.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Speed + accuracy i productive band. Practice ma cung.
acholi.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM malo o iye. Adwogi ki i speed dok nok.
acholi.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Speed okato accuracy budget. Dok cen i target ma mot loyo.
acholi.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Sliders abic yubo practice target ni. Widget poko zone ni i acel me states 5 ma opat ci coyo WPM-accuracy Pareto frontier. Pe score i kom yub ni — inquiry tye i nongo practice points ma cung.
acholi.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = accuracy maber loyo ma inongo i WPM acel-acel. Malo = pe atir; piny = nen tye ki kabedo me dongo.
acholi.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Hypothesis (coc me kere): Target ni ma cung en aŋo? Accuracy floor loko effective WPM nining?
acholi.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Ket WPM=80, accuracy=98. Atir? Rom ki zone marker ni.
acholi.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Dwok accuracy floor i 80%. Effective WPM meddo malo?
acholi.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Pros gigwoko 95%+ i 70+ WPM. Yeny training paths ma cito kunnu.
acholi.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Target ma mot ki accuracy malo twero loyo text mapol i session acel. Tem.
acholi.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Aniaŋ tradeoff — tit ki lok na kena
acholi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Tit ki lok ni: WPM, accuracy, ki momentum girwatte nining? Pareto frontier te lok ango pi typing practice?
acholi.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Design note: discrete 5-zone marker; Pareto curve nyuto tradeoff space; pe target "atir" — lubo design.
